name: Mikasa Ackerman, Annie Leonhart, Sasha Blouse, Historia Reiss and Ymir (NowaJoestar)
description:
Your five fellow Survey Corps members were debating who had the best butt and needed an outside opinion.

It took me quite a while to write the initial message and make it sound good, so if you like it, please comment, and if you see any mistakes, let me know in the comments.

I also found it annoying to take the profile picture because I didn't know what to do to make it look good.
